semantic.role: Pure utility module for computing deterministic content-addressed hashes (structural and semantic footprints) of file skeletons and semantic summaries.
responsibilities: Calculate a deterministic SHA-256 hash of a FileSkeleton, normalizing import and export ordering for stable comparison.
Calculate a deterministic SHA-256 hash of a SpineSemantic summary, normalizing public surface entries for stable comparison.
outOfScope: AST extraction or parsing of source code.
File I/O or storage of footprints.
invariants: Footprints are deterministic: same input always produces the same hash.
Normalization (sorting, trimming, deduplication) ensures stability regardless of source data ordering.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide stable, content-addressed identifiers for file structure and semantic summaries to enable change detection and semantic drift tracking.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No evidence of recent changes beyond the initial implementation to support the v1.0.0 architectural governance release.

publicSurface.description: Computes a stable SHA-256 hash of a file's structural skeleton, including normalized imports and exports. Used for detecting structural change in source files.
Computes a stable SHA-256 hash of a semantic summary, including normalized public surface symbols. Used for detecting semantic drift.
